nasb.text: Then the disciples came to Jesus privately and said, “Why could we not drive it out?”

esv.text: Then the disciples came to Jesus privately and said, “Why could we not cast it out?”

cnv.text: 門徒悄悄地前來問耶穌：“為甚麼我們不能把鬼趕出去呢？”

ccb.text: 事后，门徒私下问耶稣：“我们为什么赶不走那鬼呢？”

csbs.text: 门徒们悄悄地前来问耶稣：“我们为什么不能赶出那鬼魔呢？”
